html:
2026-0650
2026-06-22GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityProtocol on the Accession of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland to the Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific PartnershipOrder authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Protocol on the Accession of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland to the Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership, as well as any accompanying legally binding instruments.N/A
subject: Protocol on the Accession of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland to the Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Protocol on the Accession of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland to the Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership, as well as any accompanying legally binding instruments.
